creator: bennybroz105@gmail.com
text:
dear port maintainer of net-mgmt/unifi5,

The LTS version[0] of Unifi controller has been released, but net-mgmt/unifi5 is pointed to stable version. the solution is to create a new port, e.g. net-mgmt/unifi56 to accomodate LTS versions

---
[0] https://community.ubnt.com/t5/UniFi-Updates-Blog/UniFi-5-6-36-LTS-Stable-has-been-released/ba-p/2277323
